top.name: Worldshaper
top.rules_text: Choose an element. All imbued tiles of that element within range 3 explode: deal 5 damage to all adjacent enemies and are destroyed. Then imbue those tiles with a different element of your choice.

channel.name: Worldshaper (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Damage is 5 and range is 5

bottom.name: Confluence
bottom.rules_text: If you have Fire Ice and Storm tiles all on the board: deal 14 damage to target and draw 2 cards. Otherwise deal 3.

channel.name: Confluence (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Also imbue target tile with all 3 elements simultaneously
